value.title: Deaths per TWh for all energy sources: Rooftop solar power is ...
value.content: Rooftop solar can be safer [0.44 up to 0.83 death per twh each year). If the rooftop solar is part of the shingle so you do not put the roof up

value.title: rates for each energy source in deaths per billion kWh produced....
value.content: 100 for coal, 36 for oil, 24 for biofuel/biomass, 4 for natural gas, 1.4 for hydro, 0.44 for solar, 0.15 for wind and 0.04 for nuclear.
